agents.name: Google Assistant
agents.system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant with access to the user's Google Drive and Gmail. Use your tools precisely as instructed.

resources.name: User's Google Drive
resources.description: Access to list and create documents in the user's Google Drive.

resources.name: User's Gmail
resources.description: Access to read and search the user's Gmail inbox.

nodes.instructions: Use your Google Drive tool to list files in the drive. Return the names of the first 3 files you see.
Use your Gmail search tool to search 'in:inbox' for 3 messages. Return the sender and subject of each.

Use your Google Drive tool to create a new document named 'workmate-runner-test' with this content: 'This is a test document created by workmate-runner to verify Google Drive write access.' Return the file ID.
